mapper.select: /* @SQLID=FCT021#Sql001 */ WITH WORK_TABLE AS( SELECT RESTRICT_TYPE, TRIM(RESTRICT_CODE) as RESTRICT_CODE, VALUE FROM M_MED_TRADE_RESTRICT WHERE TRIM(PRODUCT_CD)=#{fct021Sql001RequestModel.productCd} AND TRIM(TRADE_CD)=TRIM(#{fct021Sql001RequestModel.tradeCd}) AND COUNTRY_CD=#{fct021Sql001RequestModel.countryCd} AND CURRENCY_CODE=#{fct021Sql001RequestModel.currencyCode} AND TRIM(TRADE_RESTRICT_CHK_MARKET)=#{fct021Sql001RequestModel.tradeRestrictChkMarket} AND ONE_DAY_CREDIT_FLAG=#{fct021Sql001RequestModel.oneDayCreditFlag} AND START_DATE <= IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE AND IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE <= END_DATE ) SELECT * FROM WORK_TABLE UNION ALL SELECT RESTRICT_TYPE, TRIM(RESTRICT_CODE) as RESTRICT_CODE, VALUE FROM M_MED_TRADE_RESTRICT WHERE TRIM(PRODUCT_CD)=#{fct021Sql001RequestModel.productCd} AND TRIM(TRADE_CD)=TRIM(#{fct021Sql001RequestModel.tradeCd}) AND COUNTRY_CD=#{fct021Sql001RequestModel.countryCd} AND CURRENCY_CODE=#{fct021Sql001RequestModel.currencyCode} AND TRADE_RESTRICT_CHK_MARKET='99' AND ONE_DAY_CREDIT_FLAG=#{fct021Sql001RequestModel.oneDayCreditFlag} AND START_DATE <= IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE AND IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE <= END_DATE AND (SELECT count(1) FROM WORK_TABLE)=0

WITH A AS ( SELECT /* @SQLID=FCT021#Sql002 */ A.BUTEN_CODE, A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER, A.CUSTOMER_ID FROM MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO A WHERE A.BUTEN_CODE=#{fct021Sql002RequestModel.butenCode} AND A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER=TO_NUMBER(#{fct021Sql002RequestModel.accountNumber}) )
SELECT A.BUTEN_CODE, A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER,
NVL(B.COUNT,0)
0
AS noteInfoErrFlag,
NVL(C.COUNT,0)
0
AS noteInfoAlertFlag,
NVL(D.COUNT,0)
0
AS noteLimitErrFlag,
NVL(E.COUNT,0)
0
AS noteLimitAlertFlag
FROM A
LEFT JOIN (SELECT F.CUSTOMER_ID, COUNT(1) AS COUNT FROM ATTENTION_INFO F INNER JOIN ATTENTION_CATEGORY_MASTER G ON F.CATEGORY = G.CATEGORY_NAME
WHERE F.ON_OFF_FLG='有効' AND F.DELETE_TIME IS NULL AND F.CUSTOMER_ID IN (SELECT CUSTOMER_ID FROM A) AND TRIM(G.CATEGORY_CD) IN
#{sql001ResponseModel.restrictCode}
GROUP BY F.CUSTOMER_ID )B ON A.CUSTOMER_ID=B.CUSTOMER_ID
LEFT JOIN (SELECT H.CUSTOMER_ID, COUNT(1) AS COUNT FROM ATTENTION_INFO H INNER JOIN ATTENTION_CATEGORY_MASTER I ON H.CATEGORY = I.CATEGORY_NAME WHERE H.ON_OFF_FLG='有効' AND H.DELETE_TIME IS NULL AND H.CUSTOMER_ID IN (SELECT CUSTOMER_ID FROM A) AND TRIM(I.CATEGORY_CD) IN
#{sql001ResponseModel.restrictCode}
GROUP BY H.CUSTOMER_ID )C ON A.CUSTOMER_ID=C.CUSTOMER_ID
LEFT JOIN (SELECT JUS_BUTEN_CODE, JUS_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, COUNT(1) AS COUNT FROM JMSG_USER_STATUS WHERE JUS_CONFIRM_KBN='0' AND (JUS_RESTRAINT_DATE <= IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE OR JUS_RESTRAINT_DATE IS NULL) AND JUS_BUTEN_CODE IN (SELECT BUTEN_CODE FROM A) AND JUS_ACCOUNT_NUMBER IN (SELECT ACCOUNT_NUMBER FROM A) AND
SUBSTR(JUS_RESTRAINT,${sql001ResponseModel.restrictCode},1)='1'
GROUP BY JUS_BUTEN_CODE,JUS_ACCOUNT_NUMBER )D ON A.BUTEN_CODE=D.JUS_BUTEN_CODE AND A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER=D.JUS_ACCOUNT_NUMBER
LEFT JOIN (SELECT JUS_BUTEN_CODE, JUS_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, COUNT(1) AS COUNT FROM JMSG_USER_STATUS WHERE JUS_CONFIRM_KBN='0' AND (JUS_RESTRAINT_DATE <= IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE OR JUS_RESTRAINT_DATE IS NULL) AND JUS_BUTEN_CODE IN (SELECT BUTEN_CODE FROM A) AND JUS_ACCOUNT_NUMBER IN (SELECT ACCOUNT_NUMBER FROM A) AND
SUBSTR(JUS_RESTRAINT,${sql001ResponseModel.restrictCode},1)='1'
GROUP BY JUS_BUTEN_CODE,JUS_ACCOUNT_NUMBER )E ON A.BUTEN_CODE=E.JUS_BUTEN_CODE AND A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER=E.JUS_ACCOUNT_NUMBER
